task_completion.description: Navigate to the employee profile of James Anderson.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the OrangeHRM interface displaying the Personal Details or Employee Profile page specifically for 'James Anderson'.

task_completion.description: Open the profile picture upload screen or dialog.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the photograph upload screen in OrangeHRM or a system file picker dialog opened after clicking the profile picture area.

task_completion.description: Successfully upload 'james_photo.jpg' as the profile picture.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a custom image replacing the default avatar on James Anderson's profile, or a green success toast/message confirming the picture upload.

task_completion.description: Upload the signed offer letter to the attachments section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 'Attachments' table/section at the bottom of the profile page. Verify that a file named 'signed_offer.pdf' is listed.

task_completion.description: Add the correct comment to the signed offer letter attachment.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Attachments' table, verify that the description/comment column for 'signed_offer.pdf' exactly matches 'Signed Offer Letter 2024'.

task_completion.description: Upload the signed NDA to the attachments section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 'Attachments' table/section at the bottom of the profile page. Verify that a file named 'nda_signed.pdf' is listed.

task_completion.description: Add the correct comment to the NDA attachment.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Attachments' table, verify that the description/comment column for 'nda_signed.pdf' exactly matches 'Executed NDA'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the OrangeHRM web interface to perform the uploads.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the actions are performed in a web browser displaying OrangeHRM, not via terminal commands (e.g., curl) or database scripts.

integrity.description: The agent used the file picker to upload the actual files from the specified directory.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the system file dialog is used to select files from '/home/ga/Documents/HR_Docs/' rather than just typing the expected output into a text editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the results.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the browser's Developer Tools (Inspect Element) are not open to artificially alter the page text to show the attachments or profile picture.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Employee: James Anderson. Profile Picture File: 'james_photo.jpg'. Attachment 1: 'signed_offer.pdf' with comment containing 'Offer' (specifically 'Signed Offer Letter 2024'). Attachment 2: 'nda_signed.pdf' with comment containing 'NDA' (specifically 'Executed NDA'). The application used is OrangeHRM.
